description_long: This is a modern rectangular mattress with a light gray, quilted top surface featuring a repeating circular pattern, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The sides are wrapped in a dark, almost black fabric with subtle horizontal wave-like stitching, giving it a contemporary look. Two wide, vertical white handles are visible on each of the longer sides, likely for ease of lifting and maneuvering. The mattress has a continuous, light-colored edge piping that runs along the top and bottom borders, adding definition and durability to the structure. The overall build suggests a multi-layered construction, likely with foam and spring or hybrid core for support and comfort. The surface appears clean, with no visible stains, tags, or brand markings.
description: A modern, rectangular mattress with a quilted light gray top, dark sides, and white handles, featuring continuous edge piping and a clean, plush appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the quilted gray top and dark side panel, with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two wide white handles on the dark side panel and the quilted top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the quilted top and dark side, with no handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two white handles on the dark side panel and the quilted top surface.
attribute_pattern_design: Quilted circular pattern evenly distributed across the top surface.
attribute_edge_piping: Continuous light-colored piping runs along the top and bottom edges, moderately thick and visually distinct.
